---
title: "About Me"
editor: 
  markdown: 
    wrap: sentence
---

# Research I'm involved in 
## Landscapes of Change Lab: 

As a researcher in the Landscapes of Change Lab, I analyze resin ducts in Sugar Pine cores from Yosemite and Sequoia National Parks. My work tracks how climate-driven pathogens and insect outbreaks impact tree health to guide restoration efforts in the southern Sierra Nevada.

[add picture] 

## Coastal Change Lab: 

As a researcher Job - I work at the Ojai Farmers market on Sundays for Wild Local Seafood Co. I enjoy representing a sustainable local fisherman’s business and educating customers.

[add picture] 


## SEEDS club
I recently joined the SEEDS club and was lucky to join their trip to the Sierra Nevada Aquatic Research Lab - include picture of SNARL Trip They also recently held a cynotyping event that was a alot of fun! 

[add picture] 


## Hobbies:
In my limited free time, I enjoy cooking, baking, crafting, and doing art. 
My favorite thing to cook/make is probably spring rolls. 
[add picture carousel?]
